name: Breville Group Limited
analysis: BRG's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 14% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$31.4250, stop A$28.3833, target A$35.1205 (1.21:1) — then trail it.
